text: As used in this article, “passenger vehicle” means “passenger vehicle” as defined in Section 34710.

# Vehicle Code
## Division 12. EQUIPMENT OF VEHICLES [24000 - 28244]
### Chapter 5. Other Equipment [27000 - 28160]
#### Article 11.5. Bumpers [28070 - 28071]
##### § 28070

As used in this article, “passenger vehicle” means “passenger vehicle” as defined in Section 34710.

*(Added by Stats. 1972, Ch. 272.)*

subsections.text: As used in this article, “passenger vehicle” means “passenger vehicle” as defined in Section 34710.
